records.ety: [L. constipatio a crowding together: cf. F. constipation.]

defs: Act of crowding anything into a less compass, or the state of being crowded or pressed together; condensation.
quotes: Fullness of matter, or a pretty close constipation . . . of its particles.

defs: A state of the bowels in which the evacuations are infrequent and difficult, or the intestines become filled with hardened fæces; costiveness.
